summary: High‑energy mid‑80s audience recording with a sweet Althea highlight and clear pop‑flavored sound.
review: Both reviewers rave about this audience tape, calling it the best‑sounding source among several recordings of the show. The performance is described as having an early‑’80s pop vibe, with Althea standing out as a particularly tasty moment. The recording captures that energy well enough to make the set enjoyable despite being an audience capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews praise both the musical vibe and the audio quality, indicating a strong show and a good audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Praised as the best‑sounding of four audience tapes; clear enough to convey the early‑80s pop vibe with no major flaws mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Mid‑1980s set described as having a bright, pop‑infused feel and solid audience energy throughout.
